title: geum × billietii
intro: Geum × billietii, also known as the white avens or avens, is a hybrid flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Geum × billietii include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the urinary system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
